description: Model 1019 remote truth for matrix userline phase 2

v.code: const root={model_id:1019,p:0,r:0,c:0};const payload=Array.isArray(label&&label.v)?label.v:[];const findValue=(key,fallback='')=>{const record=payload.find((item)=>item&&item.k===key);return record&&record.v!=null?String(record.v):fallback;};const text=findValue('message_text').trim();const sender=findValue('sender_user_id','unknown').trim()||'unknown';const roomId=findValue('room_id','phase1-room').trim()||'phase1-room';const roomName=findValue('room_name',roomId).trim()||roomId;const roomKind=findValue('room_kind',roomId.includes('group')?'group':'dm').trim()||'dm';const reply='echo: '+text;const existing=ctx.getLabel({...root,k:'room_timelines_json'});const timelines=existing&&typeof existing==='object'&&!Array.isArray(existing)?existing:{};const current=Array.isArray(timelines[roomId])?timelines[roomId].slice(-10):[];const nextTimeline=current.concat([{direction:'out',sender,text},{direction:'in',sender:'@mbr:localhost',text:reply}]).slice(-12);const nextTimelines={...timelines,[roomId]:nextTimeline};const timelineText=nextTimeline.map((item)=>String(item&&item.sender?item.sender:'system')+': '+String(item&&item.text?item.text:'')).join('\n');const resultPayload=[{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'last_remote_text',t:'str',v:reply},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'last_remote_sender',t:'str',v:'@mbr:localhost'},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'last_message_room_id',t:'str',v:roomId},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'last_sender_user_id',t:'str',v:sender},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'conversation_status',t:'str',v:'remote_processed'},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'submit_inflight',t:'bool',v:false},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'active_room_id',t:'str',v:roomId},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'active_room_name',t:'str',v:roomName},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'active_room_kind',t:'str',v:roomKind},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'room_timelines_json',t:'json',v:nextTimelines},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'timeline_json',t:'json',v:nextTimeline},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'timeline_text',t:'str',v:timelineText}];ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'last_remote_text'},'str',reply);ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'last_remote_sender'},'str','@mbr:localhost');ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'last_message_room_id'},'str',roomId);ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'last_sender_user_id'},'str',sender);ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'conversation_status'},'str','remote_processed');ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'submit_inflight'},'bool',false);ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'active_room_id'},'str',roomId);ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'active_room_name'},'str',roomName);ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'active_room_kind'},'str',roomKind);ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'room_timelines_json'},'json',nextTimelines);ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'timeline_json'},'json',nextTimeline);ctx.writeLabel({...root,k:'timeline_text'},'str',timelineText);const topic=String(ctx.getLabel({...root,k:'result_out_topic'})||'').trim();if(topic)ctx.publishMqtt(topic,{version:'v1',type:'pin_payload',op_id:'matrix_userline_phase2_'+Date.now(),source_model_id:1019,pin:'result',payload:resultPayload,timestamp:Date.now()});return resultPayload;
